summary: 7 find-replace patches across data/sections.json (P1-P2), data/uncounted-failures.json (P3-P5), and build-scripts/generate-html.js (P6-P7) extirpate the [REMOVED]/[SUSPENDED] bracket-marker strawman. Replacement text describes the actual dome mechanisms — silent removal observable via commit diffs (WIN-010, WIN-025) and SUSPENDED-Under-Revision section header grouping (PROS-003, raw-text/03-predictions.txt:72). Kernel-of-truth (silent-failure exclusion from accuracy denominator) preserved and strengthened: the new framing is reproducibly verifiable by any third party with git access to the dome repo. All find_text strings verified to match exactly once in target files at HEAD afe4cfc. Decider: apply all 7 patches → run node build.js html → grep -cE [REMOVED]|[SUSPENDED] docs/index.html should return 0 → run tests/run.sh → close ISS-2373. Sibling concern (Dome's label: prefix in renderFailureEntry) flagged in anticipated_objections #3 — proposing as separate NEW issue, not folded in. EXP-477 P4 lesson incorporated (all patches target source files, never docs/index.html directly).
